PowerShell(Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 3000 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -First 3 LocalPort, OwningProcess | Format-Table; try { \(Get-Process -Id \(Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 3000 -State Listen -ErrorAction Stop | Select-Object -First 1 -ExpandProperty OwningProcess\)\).ProcessName } catch { "nothing listening on 3000" })

PowerShell(Start-Sleep -Seconds 6; try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri http://localhost:3000 -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 30; "HTTP $\($r.StatusCode\), $\([math]::Round\($r.RawContentLength/1kb\)\)kb" } catch { "request failed: $\($_.Exception.Message\)" })
